response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.25 below your own share threshold (0.6), and our belief indicates islanded operation with declining reserves—self-preservation requires withholding the 0.5 kWh until our SoC recovers above 60% and aggregator coordination is re-established.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: SoC declining despite acceptances; islanded condition with sustained 1 kW load. Prioritize self-preservation and aggregator coordination over peer requests until SoC recovers above 60%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
